positive: A neo-ethereal, symmetrical mandalic design featuring bioluminescent flora and deep space celestial motifs. The main subject is a complex arrangement of glowing, oversized mushrooms and root systems intertwined with constellations and stylized astronomical diagrams. The color palette is limited to deep sapphire blue, glowing aqua teal, rich emerald green, and touches of soft cosmic violet. The style should mimic high-contrast engraving and watercolor wash, with clean, thick outlines and intricate detailing. Composition must be central and perfectly balanced, suitable for repeating apparel prints. The overall feel should be mystical, magical, and serene. Highly detailed, ornate, sticker art style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, blurry, distorted, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, cartoon, grainy, ugly, poorly drawn, cropped, bad anatomy, noisy, bleeding, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs
